rules.name: guilt
rules.pattern: I('m| am| feel| felt| was) (guilty|ashamed|full of shame)|\b(I apologized|I said sorry|feel like I owe)\b

rules.name: lonely
rules.pattern: I feel (alone|lonely|isolated)|I('m| am) (so lonely|feeling lonely)|\b(by myself again|no one to talk to|sitting here alone)\b
responses: Is the aloneness welcome or not?
What kind of connection would help?
